text.title: Notion PM Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Team size 2-10 AND Notion is primary PM tool?

branch.when: team_size >= 2 AND team_size <= 10 AND notion_primary_pm == true
branch.question: Sprint cadence defined AND API access required?

branch.when: team_size < 2 OR team_size > 10 OR notion_primary_pm == false
